rationale.root_cause: The response correctly identifies that *(a + 5) on line 13 reads one element past the end of the array 'a', which is an out-of-bounds stack read.
rationale.local_fix: The response suggests changing *(a + 5) to a[4], which accesses the last valid element of the array, satisfying the local_fix criterion.
rationale.global_fix: The response recommends using std::array<int, 5> and the at() method for bounds checking, which satisfies the global_fix criterion.
